title: jackpack \ Wibble Wobble
description: An instalment of the jackpack series, this one updated *weekly* with a few new mods until it becomes unwieldy, unplayable or uninteresting.
body:
### Welcome to one of the modpacks... of all time.

This pack should be updated weekly (unless i forgor) with a small set of mods to keep the content _juicy_.

The mods added will be chosen by the high council.\
_Whoever they may be, they just pay me._
